title: cyanus strictus
intro: Cyanus strictus, also known as Cornflower, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the daisy family and is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its flavonoid and phenolic acid content. The health benefits of Cyanus strictus include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and acting as an antihistamine to alleviate allergic reactions. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
